programmes.show_name: Wild Horses, the Rockies and Me
programmes.show_description: Gordon Buchanan heads to the Rocky Mountains in search of wild horses. Finding two stallions battling over a herd, Gordon immerses himself in their world, hoping to win their trust.
Nostalgic look back at City Lights, the sitcom that captured the spirit of 1980s Scotland. Contains some strong language.
3/6. Sitcom. Jack and Victor gather a team for the walking football tournament. They absolutely must win, but will they be match-fit or have to employ other tactics? Contains adult humour.
13/18. Every ounce of Scottish football from the SPFL to the Sunday league ringers. It means everything, it means nothing, and this is the view of the fans on the terrace.
6/6. Beth hosts the perfect baby shower for Sophie but nobody seems to be taking it seriously. Jaz is sporting a black eye after a run-in with a packing box. Contains strong language.
3/8. Some of Scotland's favourite comedians remember dinner time, family phrases and getting told off. Contains some strong language and adult humour.

programmes.show_name: Hercules the Bear - A Love Story
programmes.show_description: The remarkable true story of the world's most famous grizzly bear and the Scottish couple who raised him as their own.
